page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aging Atlas is a curated biomedical database comprising a range of aging-related multi-omics datasets (i.e. transcriptomics, single-cell transcriptomics, epigenomics, proteomics, and pharmacogenomics), as well as bioinformatics tools to query and visualize these datasets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Aging Atlas is a curated biomedical database comprising a range of aging-related multi-omics datasets (i.e. transcriptomics, single-cell transcriptomics, epigenomics, proteomics, and pharmacogenomics), as well as bioinformatics tools to query and visualize these datasets.
